title: Standardize API error response format across all modules
description:
API error responses are inconsistent across modules. Standardize to a consistent format:
{ "error": "Human-readable message", "code": "MACHINE_READABLE_CODE" }

Audit all router files and the error middleware. Ensure:
- All 400/404/409/500 responses follow the same shape
- Validation errors from Zod include field-level detail
- The error middleware catches unhandled errors and formats them consistently

Acceptance criteria:
- All API error responses have consistent shape
- Zod validation errors include field detail
- Error middleware is the single formatting point
